verdicts.verdict_greek: ἀφθαρσία δὲ ἐγγὺς εἶναι ποιεῖ θεοῦ·
verdicts.reasoning: On p. 614 the line ends at θεοῦ with a raised point, and ἐπιθυμία begins the next verse; this agrees with Cambridge/Tischendorf and not with First1K's run-on.

verdicts.verdict_greek: ἐπιθυμία ἄρα σοφίας ἀνάγει ἐπὶ βασιλείαν.
verdicts.reasoning: The scan on p. 614 clearly starts v.20 with ἐπιθυμία, omitted in First1K, and this matches the parallel diplomatic tradition and Rahlfs here by coincidence.

verdicts.verdict_greek: οὔτε μὴν φθόνῳ τετηκότι συνοδεύσω, ὅτι οὗτος οὐ κοινωνήσει σοφίᾳ.
verdicts.reasoning: P. 614 plainly reads συνοδεύσω and κοινωνήσει, with a comma after συνοδεύσω; First1K's συνοδεύσαα/κοινανήσει are OCR-like errors, and Cambridge/Tischendorf support Swete's reading.

notes: Adjudicated from Wisdom 6 on Swete p. 614 (image labeled 630 in the upload set); later Sirach pages are irrelevant.
